headline: Transcript: Quiz show!
summary: Katie Martin speaks to Robert Armstrong and John Foley
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Unhedged podcast episode: ‘Quiz show!’

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Katie MartinListeners, you’ve survived another festive season. You are bursting with chocolates and booze and you are quite frankly sick to the back teeth of parlour games. Well, have a little guess what we’ve got for you here. Yes. That’s right. It’s essentially another parlour game. Hooray. The festive period calls for frivolous nonsense. So we have prepared for you today a frivolous quiz, and when I say we, I very much mean I have prepared a quiz. Ladies and gentlemen, Rob, as usual, is just rocking up and making it up as he goes along. So grab a cup of tea or hell something stronger and play along at home. Today on the show, we will decide who is the winner of 2025. The stakes have arguably never been lower.

This is Unhedged, the markets and finance podcast from the Financial Times and Pushkin. I’m Katie Martin, quiz master and columnist at the FT in London. In an effort to organise doing a
